summary: Responsible for the functional and technical evolution of core checkout, payment, and platform capabilities.
highlights: Implemented a one-click checkout to reduce friction in the payment flow and improve the user experience.
Improved refund handling to increase operational flexibility and support customer service workflows.
Extended a digital voucher marketplace functionally and technically to integrate third-party products.
Expanded local payment methods to improve conversion in country-specific checkout flows.
Integrated an additional KYC provider into existing identity verification processes.
